title: Fixed #321, support for reduce ops in share command

features.name: ternary operator with reduction operators on wire vectors
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator (? :) where both branches apply reduction operators to 8-bit wire vectors, e.g., s ? |a : |b

features.name: share command with reduction operation cells
features.description: Code should include a design with $reduce_and/or/xor/xnor/bool cells that is then processed by the share -force command

features.name: reduction operators on ternary operands
features.description: Code should include both ternary operator branches using different reduction operators (reduction OR) on wire operands
